name: Beef Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 1-1/2 lb Flank steak; or shrimp or chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on package, al dente. Drain and rinse in cold water. Add a few drops of oil and mix to keep from sticking. Set aside.
2. Slice steak very thin, across the grain, into 2-inch pieces. Mix together with ginger, scallion, cornstarch, sugar, light soy sauce. Let marinate.
3. Heat wok to smoking hot. Add 2 tbsp oil. Stir fry meat mixture for two minutes, do not overcook. Reserve.
4. Add 2 tbsp oil, heat. Stir fry carrots and cabbage for two minutes. Add spaghetti and stir well. Cook a few more minutes.
5. Add meat mixture, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and salt. Stir until heated through.
6. Serve hot. Enjoy your stir-fried Beef Lo Mein!
